cards.back: An unsupervised machine learning algorithm that partitions data into K clusters based on proximity measures
A measure used to calculate the distance between two data points, such as Euclidean distance, Manhattan distance, and Cosine similarity
A technique that builds a hierarchy of clusters by merging or splitting existing clusters, resulting in a tree-like structure
A type of hierarchical clustering algorithm that groups clusters together based on the minimum distance between any two points in the clusters
A type of hierarchical clustering algorithm that groups clusters together based on the maximum distance between any two points in the clusters
